title: Lushness
description: Enhances and improves grass and foliage generation in Minecraft
body:
# Lushness

Lushness adds heavy, dense, vanilla-friendly vegetation and small rock formations to your Minecraft worlds to spice up your world generation and bring your game to life.

**_REQUIRES FABRIC_**

## Features
Natural Clustering - Plants generate in realistic groups rather than random scatter
Biome-Specific Vegetation - Each biome gets its own vegetation patterns
Small Rocks - Scattered stone, cobble, and andesite add detail to terrain
Fully Configurable - Adjust densities and types via JSON config file
Vanilla-Friendly - Uses only vanilla textures and blocks

## Compatibility
Works with (as far as I'm aware) all worldgen/terrain mods. If you find any incompatibilities, let me know.

You may use this mod in your modpacks, just be sure to credit me and the mod!
